jobs.purpose: Send an SMS via the configured provider.
steps: Load Notification + resolve template for (category, channel=sms, locale).
Check SmsOptOutRegistry::isOptedOut(phone, workspace_id). If opted out: state=permanently_failed, error=OPTED_OUT.
Check cost-cap: SmsCostCalculator::wouldExceedCap(workspace, phone_country_code). If yes: state=permanently_failed, error=COST_CAP_EXCEEDED.
Render body via Blade (SMS templates are plain-text; no MJML).
Truncate to 160 GSM-7 chars OR 70 UCS-2 chars per segment. Warn if > 3 segments.
provider.send(phone, body, sender_id) → capture SID + estimated cost.
Fire SmsSent. Actual cost updates on provider delivery webhook via SmsCostRecorded.
jobs.notes: SMS retries are more conservative than mail — duplicate SMS is worse than duplicate email (user notices).

jobs.purpose: Normalise provider webhook payload. Handles delivery receipts AND inbound SMS messages (for STOP-keyword processing).
steps: Parse webhook payload per provider convention (Twilio TwiML-style / MessageBird / Vonage / Plivo).
Branch: if inbound message: check body for STOP-family / START-family keywords → fire SmsOptedOut or SmsSubscribedIn.
Branch: if delivery receipt: look up NotificationDelivery by provider_message_id → fire SmsDelivered / SmsFailed / SmsUndeliverable per event type.
Branch: if cost update: fire SmsCostRecorded.

jobs.purpose: Create SmsOptOut row. Called by IngestSmsProviderWebhookJob when STOP keyword detected.
Monthly SMS cost report per workspace. Aggregates cost_micro_units by destination country + provider. Emailed to workspace admins on the 1st of each month.
